modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: MacBook shows "Computer Enrollment" message requiring credential renewal.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to access some company resources on my MacBook, and then this annoying "Computer Enrollment" message popped up. It says I need to renew my credentials to keep going. It's really frustrating because I just want to get my work done without these interruptions.
short_description: MacBook shows "Computer Enrollment" message requiring credential renewal.
description: So, I was just trying to access some company resources on my MacBook, and then this annoying "Computer Enrollment" message popped up. It says I need to renew my credentials to keep going. It's really frustrating because I just want to get my work done without these interruptions.
